text: <par>Although Newar <latinform>cũ</latinform> resembles reflexes of <xref ref="5539">#5539</xref>, the nasalization of the vowel leads me to include it in the present set.</par>
<par>KPM note: He is doubtful that the same word is used for all three glosses.</par>

<par>According to K. P. Malla (p.c. 2007), the basic meaning of this form is 'breast', although it is also used euphemistically for 'vagina'. He is doubtful that the same word is used for all three glosses.</par>
<par>Loan from Indic, cf. Nepali mākuro and mākal.</par>

Nepali loan.
KPM note: He is doubtful that the same word is used for all three glosses.
